case_number: Crl. Misc. Application No. S-126 of 2024

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Crl. Misc. Application No. S-126 of 2024 (Abdul Qadir Vs. Sessions Judge /J.O.P Umerkot) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Date of hearing & order 07-08-2024 Mr. Ali Hassan Chandio, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Shahzado Saleem, Additional P.G Sindh = O R D E R Adnan-ul-Karim Memon, J. The applicant Abdul Qadir has approached this Court under section 561-A Cr. P.C, by calling in question the Order dated 16-03-2021 passed by the learned Sessions Judge/Justice of Peace Umerkot in Crl. Misc Application No.196/2021, whereby he dismissed the application and imposed a fine of Rs.50,000/- upon the applicant for moving a false application. 2. Learned counsel for the applicant states that he does not press this Criminal Miscellaneous Application to the extent of prayer clause ‘B’; for lodgment of F.I.R against the private respondents; however, he insists that he will be satisfied, if the fine of Rs.50,000/- imposed by the learned Sessions Judge, is waived off. 3 The proposal seems to be reasonable and acceded to with the warning to the applicant to be careful in future in moving such false applications and if he is found indulged in such sort of affairs, appropriate action could be taken against him. 4. In view of the above, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of. JUDGE *Ali Sher*
